name: ori-cruit
description: Ori-Cruit — International Recruitment & HR Ops SaaS (multi-tenant, white-label)

scripts.dev:all: start npm run dev:api & start npm run dev:web & start npm run dev:workers
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../workers && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
